Middle Grade Adventure

Dark Life Series

Kat Falls' subsea adventure series for middle grade readers, where ocean-floor settlers, pirates, and dark gifts collide.

Explore Dark Life

Young Adult Dystopia

Inhuman Series

A dystopian YA journey beyond the wall, where mutation, survival, and impossible choices reshape everything.

Explore Inhuman

Resources for Every Reader

For Young Readers

Read the first chapter free, explore the underwater world of Dark Life, and get writing tips from Kat.

Explore →

For Educators & Librarians

Free discussion guides, lesson plans aligned to Common Core ELA and NGSS, STEM tie-ins, and printable resources.

Get Resources →

For Parents & Gift-Buyers

Age-appropriate adventure with real science. See grade ranges, content notes, and buy from 8 retailers including your local indie.

Shop Books →

The Books

Two Series. One Author.

Ages 9–12 / Grades 5–7 · Middle Grade Sci-Fi Adventure

Dark Life Series

A subsea Western set on the flooded frontier of tomorrow.

Read the Series →

Ages 13+ / Grades 6–12 · YA Dystopian Romance

Inhuman Series

Cross the wall. Break every rule.

Read the Series →

About the Author

Kathleen "Kat" Moynihan Falls

Kat Falls holds an MFA in Writing for the Screen and Stage from Northwestern University, where she now teaches as faculty. A WGA member with screenwriting credits at Disney and four optioned independent screenplays, she lives in Evanston, Illinois.

She wrote the books her sons would actually read — and a generation of readers followed them underwater.

Full Bio + FAQ
Kat Falls

NYT bestselling author of Dark Life and Inhuman.
Evanston, IL.
